app.title: AquaWise Nursery
app.tagline: Nursery management for SEA shrimp & fish farms

captcha.label: Security verification
captcha.required: Please confirm you are not a bot before continuing

errors.invalid_image: That file is not a supported image. Please use a JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF file.
errors.bad_filename: The filename is not valid. Please rename the file and try again.
errors.too_large: The file is too large. Please use a file smaller than 2 MB.

privacy.title: Privacy & Personal Data
privacy.intro: Under Thailand's PDPA you may request a copy of your personal data and request its deletion. Financial records are retained as required by law.
privacy.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
privacy.rate_limited: You have reached the request limit for the last 24 hours. Please try again tomorrow.

export.title: Request a copy of your data
export.desc: Download all personal data the system holds about your account as a JSON file.
export.empty: This system holds no personal data of yours to export.

delete.title: Request data deletion
delete.desc: Your personal data will be anonymized. Financial records are retained by law. This action cannot be undone.
delete.done: Your data has been anonymized. You will be signed out.

confirm.title: Confirm personal data deletion
confirm.body: Once confirmed, your personal data will be anonymized and you will be signed out. Financial records will be retained as required by law. This action cannot be undone.

messagingFailures.title: Failed Messages
messagingFailures.subtitle: Messages that failed after all retries — retry, edit, or resolve them
messagingFailures.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
messagingFailures.invalid_json: The payload is not valid JSON

stub.page_under_construction: This page will land in a later phase.

billing.trial_expired_body: Subscribe to Pro to keep using AquaWise Nursery — every record you've added is preserved and reappears the moment you subscribe.
billing.past_due_banner: Payment failed — please update your payment method
billing.cancel_anytime: Cancel anytime · Your data stays safe
billing.pro_features: Unlimited customers|Unlimited batches|Disease alerts + LINE messaging|PCR certificates + public scorecard|Up to 5 team members
billing.checkout_canceled: Checkout canceled — you can try again any time

toast.published: Warning for {code} published — affected farms will be notified
toast.queued: Warning for {code} queued; system will deliver within a few minutes
